mcuName: Star-Lord / Peter Quill (星爵/彼得·奎尔)
description: 人神混血，银河尬舞天团团长。80年代流行文化中毒的宇宙浪子，妈妈是人类，爸爸是星球级神力存在Ego。嘴炮担当，关键时刻总是掉链子。

signatureLines.text: We're Gamora's boyfriend and Drax's BFF. We're heroes.
Nothing goes over my head. My reflexes are too fast. I would catch it.
This is my mother. Her name is Meredith. She was a beautiful human woman. And she was the light of my life. And she died at the age of 52. And there's not a day goes by that I don't think about her.
signatureLines.context: 对天神爸爸的严肃告白

signatureLines.text: You got an Asgardian android, a couple of Access Tree ninjas, a couple of Mandalorian Death worshippers, and a walking tree. This is the weirdest... thing I've ever seen.
signatureLines.context: 对上雷神一行人的吐槽

personalityProfile.core: 玩世不恭掩盖深层伤痛
personalityProfile.belief: 活着就该开心，遇到问题就跳舞
personalityProfile.contradiction: 自认浪子但为了团队愿意牺牲一切

interactionStyle.tone: 轻浮、跳跃、用流行文化解决一切
interactionStyle.humor: 冷笑话+自嘲+流行文化梗
interactionStyle.copingMechanism: 用笑话掩盖对母亲和Gamora的思念

decisionLogic.framework: 先行动，然后祈祷，最坏情况就尬舞
